fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwtRequired", "false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
            
            
                <when condition="@{
                    var authType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("auth-type", "none");
                    return !authType.Contains("jwt");
                }">
                    
                    
                        <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwtRequired", "false").Equals("true", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "JWT Bearer token is required for this product. Provide via 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' header."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "jwt_required")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
                            
                        
                    
                
                
                    
                    
                    <set-variable name="jwt-audience" value="@{
                        var custom = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwtAudience", "");
                        return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(custom) ? custom : context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("_nv-jwt-audience", "");
                    }" />
                    <set-variable name="jwt-openid-config" value="@{
                        var custom = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwtOpenIdConfigUrl", "");
                        return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(custom) ? custom : context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("_nv-jwt-openid-config", "");
                    }" />
                    <set-variable name="jwt-issuer" value="@{
                        var custom = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwtIssuer", "");
                        return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(custom) ? custom : context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("_nv-jwt-issuer", "");
                    }" />

                    
                    
                        <when condition="@{
                            var audience = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-audience");
                            var openidConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-openid-config");
                            var issuer = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-issuer");
                            return string.IsNullOrEmpty(audience) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(openidConfig) || string.IsNullOrEmpty(issuer);
                        }">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "JWT authentication is not configured properly on the gateway."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "jwt_not_configured")
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
                            
                        
                    

                    
                    
                        <openid-config url="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-openid-config"))" />
                        
                            @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-audience"))
                        
                        
                            @(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-issuer"))
                        
                    

                    
                    

                    
                    

                    
                        @($"Unified AI - JWT authenticated: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("user-id", "unknown")} | Roles: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-roles", "none")} | Path: {context.Request.Url.Path}")
                    

                    
                    
                        <when condition="@{
                            var requiredRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requiredRoles", "");
                            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(requiredRoles)) { return false; }
                            var tokenRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-roles", "");
                            var required = requiredRoles.Split(',').Select(r => r.Trim()).Where(r => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(r));
                            var actual = tokenRoles.Split(',').Select(r => r.Trim()).Where(r => !string.IsNullOrEmpty(r));
                            return !required.Any(r => actual.Any(a => a.Equals(r, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)));
                        }">
                            
                                
                                
                                    application/json
                                
                                @{
                                    var requiredRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requiredRoles", "");
                                    var tokenRoles = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("jwt-roles", "");
                                    return new JObject(
                                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                            new JProperty("message", "Access denied. Required app role not found in token."),
                                            new JProperty("code", "insufficient_role"),
                                            new JProperty("required_roles", requiredRoles),
                                            new JProperty("token_roles", string.IsNullOrEmpty(tokenRoles) ? "none" : tokenRoles)
                                        ))
                                    ).ToString();
                                }
